title: Soulful Japa:Session16:Relationship between Aprākrta Nama Prabhu &  Śaktyāvēşa Nama:Part 1-Module12
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: Jai Srila Prabhupada, Hare Krishna Nama Prabhuki Jai, welcome all of you today we
will be discussing some part of module 12 it's a very long module and this is
with regard to which we have already discussed several times the relationship
between the Prakrita Transcendental Nama from the spiritual world who is
incarnated into the Prakrita Nama Shabda generated by our tongue which
becomes empowered with all the Shaktis
and therefore this this sound is also called Shakti Avesha Avatara but we
should know the Shakti is there in it because the Prakrita Nama is there has
descended into it so therefore the Shakti is the Shakti of the Prakrita Nama
it's like copper wire by itself
does not become electricity it acts as good as electricity no doubt the copper
wire is not in the same state as it was before electricity the motion of
electrons everything it's in a different state of existence in the same way the
Shabda on our tongue is no longer in the same ordinary material sound
that is empowered and it is spiritualized also so it is a spiritual sound it's not a
material sound as far as Prakrita Nama is concerned no doubt it is a spiritual
sound all spiritual sound but this is also a spiritualized sound what is on
your tongue and through this spiritualized service to this spiritualized tongue to this spiritualized tongue
spiritualized Nama, which is Shakti Avesha Nama, we get access to the, to serve the Amarakrita Nama.
By placing our attention, placing our devotion, placing our service to the Shakti Avesha Nama,
that means the Nama on our tongue, we serve nicely by distinctly chanting, sharply hearing
and repeating uninterruptedly.
All these surveys are received by the Amarakrita Nama, the Transcendental Lord.
This should be remembered.
Whether you are a neophyte or you are advanced, does not matter.
That is the beauty of incarnation of the Lord, both Archa Vigraha and this thing.
As long as you are sincere,
whether your present impurity, your present incapabilities, your present blindness does
not prevent the Lord from receiving your service.
As long as one has some devotion, even if someone does not have devotion, one gets the
effect from the spiritualized sound up to liberation.
By just by touching the sound, you can get up to liberation.
The personal reciprocation of the Lord is possible also, not only, you know, getting
up to liberation or freedom from material energy, etc.

glories of the Shakti Avesha Nama.
